article_title: Precision-Fermented Dairy Draws Fresh Capital as Standing Ovation Raises $34.2 Million and Market Projections Reach $57 Billion

content_preview.title: Precision-Fermented Dairy Draws Fresh Capital as Standing Ovation Raises $34.2 Million and Market Projections Reach $57 Billion
content_preview.summary: A wave of investment is flowing into precision-fermented dairy proteins, with French startup Standing Ovation closing a $34.2 million Series B and the broader market projected to grow from $7.4 billion to $57.1 billion by 2032.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Precision fermentation, the process of programming microorganisms to produce bioidentical dairy proteins without cows, is attracting a renewed wave of investment as several startups approach commercial scale. French company Standing Ovation closed a $34.2 million Series B round on March 31, the latest in a string of funding rounds across the sector that collectively signal growing confidence in fermentation-derived dairy as a viable industrial category.
